title: Mellow Roasted Jamaican Pork Skewers
description: A sweet and juicy Jamaican dish featuring roasted pork skewers, this recipe is low in sodium and perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together brown sugar, soy sauce, thyme, scotch bonnet peppers, and garlic.
Add the pork pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated pork pieces onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a bamboo tray lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the rendered lardons over the pork skewers.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Turn the skewers over and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes, or until the pork is cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
